0.details:
I would like to thank Pedro, who is my best friend for 20 years.
He hosted a big surprise birthday party for me.
I was so overwhelmed with joy and could not believe that he did that for me.
It was the best thing because I had never had anyone do such a thing for me.
0.model_generation:
Dear Pedro,

I can’t begin to express how grateful I am for the incredible surprise birthday party you organized. When I walked into the room and saw all of our friends gathered there, I was overwhelmed with joy. I never imagined anyone would go to such lengths to celebrate me, and the warmth and care you poured into every detail left me speechless.

Having you as my best friend for the past twenty years has been one of the greatest gifts of my life. Your thoughtfulness and generosity on my special day reminded me how lucky I am to have you by my side. From the decorations to the delicious cake, every moment felt perfect because you planned it with love.

Thank you, Pedro, for making this birthday unforgettable. Your friendship means more to me than words can say, and I will cherish this memory forever.

With heartfelt appreciation,
Your friend, always
0.final_version:
Dear Pedro,

I can’t begin to express how grateful I am for the incredible surprise birthday party you organised for me. When I walked into the room and saw all of our friends gathered there, I was overwhelmed with joy. I never imagined anyone would go to such lengths to celebrate me, and the warmth and care you poured into every detail left me speechless.

Having you as my best friend for the past twenty years has been one of the greatest gifts of my life. Your thoughtfulness and generosity on my special day reminded me how lucky I am to have you by my side. From the decorations to the delicious cake, every moment felt perfect because you planned it with love.

Thank you, Pedro, for making this birthday unforgettable. Your friendship means more to me than words can say, and I will cherish this memory forever. I love you, my friend.

With heartfelt appreciation,
Your friend, always

1.details:
I would write to Sibongile.
A letter of condolences as she has just lost her father.
I will mention how deeply sorry I am and wish I were there to comfort her.
I will let her know that if she needs anything, she can let me know, as I am here for her.
Then ask how she is holding up.
I will encourage her to be strong.
1.model_generation:
Dear Sibongile,

I was devastated to hear of your father’s passing. Please accept my deepest condolences and know how much I wish I could be there to comfort you. Your father was a remarkable man whose kindness and strength always shone. His legacy lives on in the stories you shared and the joy he brought to everyone who knew him.

If you need anything at all—someone to talk to, help with arrangements, or simply a shoulder to lean on—please reach out. I’m here for you, always. How are you holding up during this difficult time? Please remember to take each day at your own pace as you navigate this loss. I want to support you in any way I can, even from afar.

Stay strong, my dear friend, and allow yourself to grieve. You are not alone, and brighter days will come.

With all my sympathy and love,
Your friend
1.final_version:
Dear Sibongile,

I was devastated to hear of your father’s passing. Please accept my deepest condolences and know how much I wish I could be there to comfort you. Your father was a remarkable man whose kindness and strength always shone. His legacy lives on in the stories you shared and the joy he brought to everyone who knew him.

If you need anything at all—someone to talk to, help with arrangements, or simply a shoulder to lean on—please reach out. I’m here for you, always. How are you holding up during this difficult time? Please remember to take each day at your own pace as you navigate this loss. I want to support you in any way I can, even from afar. Should I come over to assist you? You can send me your bank details so that I can give a little I have to at least buy beautiful flowers for your lovely dad.

Stay strong, my dear friend, and allow yourself to grieve. You are not alone, and brighter days will come. Always know that you have a sister in me to confide in.

With all my sympathy and love,
Your friend

2.details:
I would write a wedding vow to my husband Pedro.
I have been with for 16 years.
How I love and appreciate him for all that he has done for me and our little family.
How I want us to grow old together.
How I will never let go but will be together forever.
2.model_generation: Pedro, sixteen years ago, I never imagined how much life would change when you came into mine. Every day since has been a gift you’ve shaped with kindness, laughter, and unwavering devotion. You’ve held my hand through triumphs and trials, building our little family on a foundation of love, trust, and endless dreams. Today, before our cherished friends and family, I vow to honor and cherish you for all you have done—for me, for us—for standing beside me with strength and tenderness. I promise to nurture our love as it grows, to celebrate your triumphs, share your burdens, and feed your spirit with gratitude and respect. I pledge to be your partner in adventure, your confidant in doubt, and your refuge in storm. I will never let go of the bond we’ve formed. As we walk into every tomorrow, I promise to love you, Pedro, now and forever.
2.final_version: Pedro, sixteen years ago, I never imagined how much life would change when you came into my empty world. Every day since has been a gift you’ve shaped with kindness, laughter, and unwavering devotion. You’ve held my hand through triumphs and trials, building our little family on a foundation of love, trust, and endless dreams as you mended my broken heart. Today, before our cherished friends and family, I vow to honour and cherish you for all you have done—for me, for us—for standing beside me with strength and tenderness. I promise to nurture our love as it grows, to celebrate your triumphs, share your burdens, and feed your spirit with gratitude and respect. You have been the best husband to me and the world's best dad to our children. I pledge to be your partner in adventure, your confidant in doubt, and your refuge in storm. I will never let go of the bond we’ve formed. As we walk into every tomorrow, I promise to love you, Pedro, now and forever.

3.details:
I will write to Thando.
Who is my younger son.
To apologise for not buying him the PlayStation 5 I had promised him for his birthday.
To let him know that things did not go according to how I had planned them.
I will tell him how sorry I am and how I love him.
I will let him know that I will try my best to make it possible for his next birthday.
3.model_generation:
Dear Thando,

I am writing to say how sorry I am for not buying you the PlayStation 5 I promised for your birthday. I know how much you were looking forward to it, and I feel terrible that things did not go as I had planned. Unexpected bills arrived at the last minute, and I simply could not make it happen in time. You deserved better.

I love you more than anything, and it pains me to have let you down. Your happiness means the world to me, and I understand if you feel disappointed or upset. I promise to do my very best to save up and make it possible for your next birthday. We will work together to find the console you’ve been dreaming of.

Thank you for being patient and understanding. You are an amazing son, and I will do everything I can to make this right.

Love,
Dad
3.final_version:
Dear Thando,

I am writing to say how sorry I am for not buying you the PlayStation 5 I promised for your birthday, my son. I know how much you were looking forward to it, and I feel terrible that things did not go as I had planned. Unexpected bills arrived at the last minute, and I simply could not make it happen in time. You deserved better, my sweet boy.

I love you more than anything, and it pains me to have let you down. Your happiness means the world to me, and I understand if you feel disappointed or upset. I promise to do my very best to save up and make it possible for your next birthday. We will work together to find the console you’ve been dreaming of.

Thank you for being patient and understanding. You are an amazing son, and I will do everything I can to make this right.

Love,
Mom

4.details:
I would write a birthday speech to my first daughter, Angel.
On her 21st birthday.
Letting her know how much I love and appreciate her.
She has been the best daughter I could ever ask for, because of how respectful and understanding she has always been.
How I want her to grow in the way I have raised her to fear GOD in everything she does.
Let her know that she has grown to be a woman now and about to embark the journey of life.
Encourage her to do her best and excel in everything she does in the future, especially in her academic life and strive to be an independent woman.
4.model_generation:
My dear Angel, today you celebrate your 21st birthday, and my heart overflows with joy and pride. From the moment you entered our lives, you have been a constant source of love, grace, and wonder. Your respect for others, your understanding spirit, and your unwavering kindness are gifts I cherish.

As your mother, I have prayed and guided you to fear God in every step, trusting His wisdom and grace. Today, you stand as a remarkable woman, ready to embark on life’s grand journey.

I encourage you to pursue excellence in your studies, to seek truth, to nurture your dreams with courage, and to build a life of independence and integrity. Always remember how deeply you are loved, how proud I am of the woman you have become, and how excited I am for all the amazing chapters ahead.

Happy 21st birthday, Angel. May God continue to guide you and bless you.
4.final_version:
My lovely daughter, Angel. Today, as you turn 21 years, I have decided to write this to you. Not only to encourage you, but also to take this opportunity to appreciate you for being the best daughter I could ever ask for. I love you so much, and I want you to know that I can't trade you for anything, even in the next life, I'll still want you to be my first fruit of the womb. You have been so respectful from the very onset until today, and that is very rare to happen these days, especially when kids now know their rights.

I pray that you never depart from the word of God and always know that without him you are nothing and should always seek his presence first, in anything you do in life. You have now grown to be a beautiful young woman who can be asked for her hand in marriage anytime soon and start your own family. I want you to build your family to grow in the same way I have taught you to have the same peace and joy I had with you. Never ever forget to kneel down and pray any day you go through trials and tribulations. Never confide in any human but God should be your best friend that you trust in telling all your problems. 

Take good care of yourself, my love. Always know that you will always be my baby, no matter how old you might be.

5.details:
I would write a tribute to my late daughter, Mercy.
She meant a lot to us as a family.
My heart is broken into pieces and confused on how to navigate my life without her in my life without her.
How I will forever remember her first smile as a tiny baby, even in pain as she was born and stayed in the hospital till death after a month.
I will always wonder what she was going to look like or become in future.
I want her to know that I have made peace with her departure and want her to be our guardian angel.
Tell her how much I will always love her and she should rest in perfect peace.
5.model_generation: In loving memory of Mercy, our beloved daughter, whose gentle spirit illuminated our lives from her first fragile breath. Though pain marked her entry and she stayed in the hospital for a month, her earliest smile remains etched in our hearts—a precious reminder of her courage and grace. Our family’s hearts are shattered, raw with longing and the quiet confusion of moving forward without her innocent warmth. We will forever wonder who she might have become, what laughter or achievements might have graced her days. Yet in our sorrow, we find peace, embracing her memory as the beacon that guides us. Mercy, you are now our guardian angel, watching over us with that same radiant smile. We promise to carry your light in every kind act and loving word. Until we meet again, know that we love you beyond measure. Rest in perfect peace, sweet daughter.
5.final_version: To my beautiful daughter, Mercy. I want you to know that you meant the world to us as a family. You came into our lives and brought so much joy, as you had such a great impact on us as a family. I am writing this with a broken heart, because I never thought I would be saying goodbye so soon to you. You lived such a short life, but it felt like I had known you forever. I am still trying to navigate how I will be able to live my life without you. I can still remember your first like it just happened a few minutes ago. You were so resilient that you could smile even in pain, as you had all those wires and tubes connected to your tiny body. I am sad that I lost you, but I am glad that you will never be in pain again. If my love could keep you, you would have lived forever. I want you to know that I have come to terms of acceptance with your departure because I want to free your spirit to rest, since you fought so hard to live for me. You will forever be my precious baby, and I love you so much. May your lovely soul rest in perfect peace.

post_survey.present_other: I do not have any other demographic characteristics.
post_survey.mask_other: Not that I can think of.
post_survey.feedback: It was a great study and I loved it, especially since it gave me an opportunity to write something about my late daughter.
